full_text:
Wang Jing (Yanwei) 王經 (彥偉)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Jing (王經), styledYanwei (彥偉). Struggled against Jiang Wei. Supported Cao Mao when Mao tried to remove Sima Zhao. Wang Jing was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Wang Jing lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
